message:
test(oracle): add 5 conformance tests: HAVING, GROUP BY COALESCE, updates, derived tables

New conformance oracle tests:
- HAVING with complex multi-aggregate expressions (AVG, CASE, MAX-MIN)
- GROUP BY with COALESCE/IFNULL on NULL categories
- Sequential UPDATE verification (ledger transfers with ROUND)
- Derived table complex: nested GROUP BY+CASE, MAX of subquery, LIMIT

All 126 oracle tests pass. 0 mismatches with C SQLite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
